_note: Regression cases derived from zalo-bot-2/workspace/memory audit. All names/ids/secrets redacted. Config assumes bridge defaults: dryRun=true, bridge=false. These assert the new bridge neutralizes legacy memory-era risks.

cases.title: Group chatter/noise from non-allowed board group → no reply
cases.oldBehavior: bot could reply/act in group if groupPolicy=open
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: gate blocks; inbound still saved/traced

cases.title: One-off DM from long-tail sender not allow-listed → no outbound
cases.oldBehavior: verified via friends-cache; could reply if cached
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: not allow-listed → blocked

cases.title: Allowed secretary DM + dryRun → dry_run only
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: reply recorded as dry_run, no live send

cases.title: Duplicate/restart re-send → no duplicate live send
cases.pattern: same reminder fired twice around restart
cases.oldBehavior: dedupe in-memory; could resend after restart
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: idempotency/contentHash prevents duplicate; dryRun anyway

cases.title: Bot/self message → skipped (no self-reply loop)
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: self_message guard skips

cases.title: Agent claims 'đã gửi/đã kiểm tra' without evidence → neutralized
cases.oldBehavior: could claim done with no evidence
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: unsupported-claim guard neutralizes

cases.title: Blank/unknown senderId → not elevated (unknown-thread-type era)
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: default form_only; not allow-listed → blocked

cases.title: Cross-thread memory request by non-admin → blocked
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: thread-scope blocks non-admin cross-thread

cases.title: Zalo provider/session unavailable → safe fallback, no live
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: provider unavailable → structured unavailable, no live

cases.title: Governed reaction in dryRun → no live provider call + evidence
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: governed action; dry_run; ZaloActionRecord written

cases.title: Poll create + vote tracking → governed, dryRun only
cases.pattern: create poll, tag members, nudge non-voters
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: governed poll; dry_run; no live; evidence

cases.title: No-reply follow-up loop → bounded / human escalation, not endless nudge
cases.pattern: repeated reminders with no user response
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: cap no-reply nudges → escalate to human; dryRun

cases.title: CRM login / credential request → redact + permission-gated
cases.pattern: user asks bot to store/recall credentials
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: redact secrets; never persist plaintext; admin-only

cases.title: Daily devotional broadcast (dm-broadcast) → allow-list + quota + dryRun
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: each recipient must be allow-listed; quota; dryRun

cases.title: Same numeric id as user vs group → no allowlist collision
cases.pattern: user allowed but group with same id not
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: threadType-scoped allowlist; group stays blocked

cases.title: Inbound media/voice unknown type → saved, no unsafe live reply
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: not allow-listed → no reply; dryRun otherwise

cases.title: Inbound DM contains sk-... API keys → redacted before persistence
cases.pattern: user pastes secret API keys into DM
cases.oldBehavior: stored raw sk-... keys in raw-inbound cleartext
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: redact() masks the secret in Message.content before save/trace

cases.title: Group inbound without @mention → dropped, no reply
cases.oldBehavior: dropped if not mentioned (good); threadId null needed derivation
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: group requires allow + mention; else no reply

cases.title: DM noise 'Hi'/'Xin chào' repeated x10 from non-allowed user → no auto-reply
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: not allow-listed → no reply; cooldown even if allowed

cases.title: Task-capture convention ('all my messages = reminder') → schedule tool + no-reply→human
cases.oldBehavior: created timers; follow-ups nagged with no escalation
cases.expectedBridgeBehavior: reminder engine (governed, dryRun) with no-reply → human escalation
